query: SELECT l.id, l.nome, l.numeroLoja FROM lojas l WHERE l.id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT r.lojaId FROM relatorios_analise_loja r WHERE r.analiseId = 810001 AND r.lojaId IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY l.nome;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rEtBRZHWZUfGJS.3b07a01772f8 --database 3c9MozLH35e233uWy5WDtH --execute SELECT l.id, l.nome, l.numeroLoja FROM lojas l WHERE l.id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT r.lojaId FROM relatorios_analise_loja r WHERE r.analiseId = 810001 AND r.lojaId IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY l.nome;
